summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CRM Sales Reports module focusing on new features: multi-value filters, YTD toggle, cache implementation, and fixed chart lines for old years. Backend APIs fully functional after restart, frontend working well with persistent chart rendering issues.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: PostgreSQL connection pool exhaustion causing 500 errors
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Backend restart resolves the issue - pool configuration may need adjustment

ui_bugs.issue: Chart width/height rendering warnings - charts show negative dimensions width(-1) and height(-1)
ui_bugs.selector: All chart containers across all pages

integration_issues.issue: Recharts components showing width(-1) and height(-1) errors in console on all pages

passed_tests: Backend multi-value filters: /api/kpis?marca=AMBISSION,QEPO returns filtered data correctly
Backend YTD filter: /api/sales-by-year?ytd_day=03-24 filters all years to March 24 correctly
Backend /api/year-monthly?years=2021,2025,2026 returns data for all 3 years including old years like 2021
All 14 backend API endpoints working correctly after restart
Frontend Dashboard loads with KPIs showing percentages and real data
Frontend 'Hasta la fecha' toggle on Dashboard works correctly
Frontend multi-select filter dropdowns work - successfully selected multiple marca options
Frontend Ventas page: year badges are clickable, 2021 selection works, data loads correctly
Frontend Ventas page: 'Hasta la fecha' toggle filters data correctly
Frontend navigation between all 5 pages (Dashboard, Ventas, Productos, Tiendas, Clientes) works
Frontend dark mode toggle works correctly
Cache implementation working - API responses are fast after initial load
Fixed chart lines for old years like 2021 - data loads and displays correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix chart rendering issues in recharts components - charts are consistently showing negative width/height dimensions across all pages. Consider adding proper container sizing, minWidth/minHeight properties, or CSS fixes to chart containers. Also consider optimizing PostgreSQL connection pool settings to prevent connection exhaustion under load.

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All API endpoints working, multi-value filters, YTD functionality, and cache working perfectly
success_percentage.frontend: 90% - All core functionality works including new features, only chart rendering warnings remain
